title: Device Home Screen  - Connecting HS without internet access
scenario: Headset pairing and connection via Poly Studio Mobile app succeeds when phone has no internet access (WiFi and cellular off)
steps: 1. Turn off WiFi and cellular data on the phone (no internet access).
2. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
3. Put the headset into pairing mode (press and hold the Bluetooth button until the LED flashes red/blue).
4. In the app, tap "Add Device" or the "+" icon on the Home screen to start scanning.
5. Wait for the headset to appear in the list of available devices.
6. Tap the headset name to initiate pairing and connection.
7. Observe the device list on the Home screen after pairing completes.
expected: The headset appears as \"Connected\" in the device list on the Home screen of the Poly Studio Mobile app.
